faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Farmingdale?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Farmingdale typically ranges from $350 to $2,000, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and upfront quotes with no hidden fees, ensuring you understand the full scope of treatment before we begin.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants or termites in my Farmingdale home?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ants are larger than regular ants (up to 5/8 inch), black or dark brown, and leave behind piles of sawdust-like wood shavings. Unlike termites, carpenter ants don't eat wood—they excavate it to build nests. Our technicians provide free inspections to accurately identify the pest and recommend the most effective treatment plan for your Farmingdale property.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a carpenter ant problem in Farmingdale?

Our local technicians are familiar with the area and can quickly reach your property to assess the situation and begin treatment, minimizing potential structural damage to your home or business.

faqs.question: Are your carpenter ant treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols to protect your family and pets. Our treatments are highly effective against carpenter ants while being safe for residential and commercial use. We provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions and can schedule treatments at times that are most convenient for your household.
